description: Lab-centric registry generated from peptide_testing_labs.xlsx. 'coa_template_owner' labs have reference COAs under COAs/<coa_folder> for visual fingerprinting. Vendors are tracked separately if needed; current corpus is organized by issuing lab.

trust_levels.high: Widely used and trusted across the research-peptide community; public/QR-verifiable COAs, strong track record.
trust_levels.established_pharma_cro: Reputable accredited contract labs oriented to manufacturers/regulatory work (cGMP/ICH).
trust_levels.established_cro: Credible accredited analytical labs (e.g. ISO 17025), less community-facing.
trust_levels.moderate: Recognized labs with a smaller or less-documented independent track record.
trust_levels.emerging: Newer platforms / accreditation pending; promising but unproven.

labs.name: ACS Laboratory (ACS Lab)
labs.accreditation: Yes — ISO/IEC 17025:2017 accredited by A2LA; also CAP accredited, CLIA licensed, and DEA registered. acslab+1
labs.description: Independent US peptide testing lab offering HPLC purity analysis, ESI mass spectrometry identity confirmation, contaminant screening, and COA verification for 85+ peptides.

labs.name: Colmaric Analyticals
labs.description: US (Florida) contract analytical lab for nutraceutical/dietary supplement/pharma industries; HPLC purity testing and detailed third-party peptide COAs.

labs.name: Janoshik Analytical
labs.description: Popular for anabolic/peptide testing with verifiable COAs. High volume for research peptides.

labs.name: Krause Analytical (Krause Labs)
labs.caveat: Downgraded from 'high' 2026-06-01: independent multi-lab comparison (graymarket, 'Testing the Peptide Testers') documented a ~15% mass discrepancy vs Janoshik (9 vials) and Chromate on the same batch (26mg vs ~30mg), with multiple further user-reported inconsistencies. A relative newcomer; not accused of fraud, but cross-check mass/purity against an established lab before relying on its numbers.
labs.description: Austin, TX contract research/testing lab offering peptide purity, potency, and identity testing by LC-MS, plus custom contaminant screening; verifiable COAs.

labs.name: MZ Biolabs
labs.accreditation: Not clearly verified in the search results I found; the site states it is DEA licensed. Mzbiolabs
labs.description: Specialty testing lab that offers peptide COA testing, purity analysis, and quantification for research compounds. mzbiolabs+1

labs.name: Peptide Test
labs.description: Analysis performed in Michigan by pharma QC scientists; HPLC and UV purity/potency testing with USP/NF-based method validation and per-peptide COAs.

labs.name: Vanguard Laboratory
labs.description: Comprehensive peptide testing including HPLC purity/quantity, identity, sterility, endotoxins, heavy metals. Quick turnaround.

labs.name: ARL Bio Pharma (Analytical Research Laboratories)
labs.description: Contract lab for therapeutic/synthetic peptides (identity, purity, impurities). Supports pharma and research.

labs.name: BioPharmaSpec
labs.description: Specialist peptide characterization lab (US/UK); higher-order structure, sequence, purity and impurity analysis suitable for IND/NDA/BLA submissions.

labs.name: Charles River Laboratories
labs.description: Major global CRO offering biologics/peptide characterization: mass spectrometry identity, purity/impurity, sequence and higher-order structure analysis supporting regulatory submissions.

labs.name: Eurofins BioPharma Product Testing
labs.description: Major global network offering comprehensive peptide testing (identity, purity, impurities, potency). GMP support.

labs.name: GALAB
labs.description: ISO 17025-certified peptide analysis laboratory specializing in HPLC, LC-MS, ICP-MS, identity verification, and pharmaceutical-grade purity testing.

labs.name: WuXi AppTec (Lab Testing Division)
labs.description: Global CRO offering comprehensive peptide testing (identity, purity, impurities, potency, bioanalysis) supporting CMC and regulatory programs.

labs.name: AltaBioscience
labs.accreditation: Yes — UKAS ISO 17025:2017 accredited for amino acid analysis and protein sequencing, with ISO 9001:2015 for other services. altabioscience
labs.description: UK lab providing protein/peptide identification, sequencing, and analytical services. Altabioscience

labs.name: Biosynth
labs.description: Manufacturer with dedicated analytical laboratories offering peptide QC, identity, purity, and analytical consultancy services.

labs.name: MDx BioAnalytical Laboratory
labs.accreditation: Yes — ISO/IEC 17025:2017 accredited by PJLA, according to the site. mdxbiolabs
labs.description: Offers peptide analysis and raw material testing using HPLC and mass spectrometry. mdxbiolabs

labs.name: Novatia, LLC
labs.accreditation: Independent MS lab (20+ yrs); cGMP/pharma support available
labs.description: US analytical lab with Orbitrap, ion-trap and QToF mass spectrometers plus NMR; peptide/protein identity, purity and characterization by LC-MS with COAs. Long-standing academic/industry track record.

labs.name: Pharmetric Laboratory
labs.description: St. Petersburg, FL lab performing sterility assurance, endotoxin, and method suitability testing (incl. peptides); fast turnaround with online COA/data portal.

labs.name: Prime Analytical Laboratories (PAL)
labs.description: Concord, CA analytical chemistry and microbiology lab serving pharma, compounding pharmacies, and peptide products; full COA testing.

labs.name: ResolveMass Laboratories
labs.accreditation: Advanced MS/structural analysis for regulatory needs
labs.description: Canadian analytical CRO specializing in LC-MS/MS, peptide mapping, amino acid analysis, and advanced peptide characterization.

labs.name: Vici Health Sciences
labs.description: US analytical and formulation lab providing peptide formulation analytical testing, method development, and stability/QC for research and pharma.

labs.name: Chromate
labs.accreditation: Not clearly verified in the search results I found; the site states it is DEA licensed. Mzbiolabs
labs.description: Analytical services lab referenced in peptide-testing directories. chromate+1

labs.name: Creative Proteomics
labs.description: Analytical CRO offering peptide purity assessment by HPLC and mass spectrometry, identity confirmation, and characterization reporting.

labs.name: Ethos Analytics
labs.description: ISO/IEC 17025-accredited analytical laboratory focused on peptide purity, quantitation, CRO services, and advanced analytical chemistry workflows.

labs.name: Finnrick Analytics
labs.accreditation: Independent testing/ratings platform (not an analytical lab itself)
labs.caveat: Aggregator/ratings platform that outsources the actual analysis to contract labs (reported to include Krause, whose accuracy is itself in question), not a primary analytical lab. Trustpilot reviews report slow turnaround and unresponsive communication, with some accusations of unreturned/untested samples (company attributes this to backlog). Treat its published numbers as only as reliable as the underlying lab; verify independently.
labs.description: Conducts large-scale independent testing for purity/potency and publishes rankings. Transparency-focused.

labs.name: Freedom Diagnostics Testing
labs.description: High-precision purity/identification and net peptide content testing. Fast turnaround, transparent COAs.

labs.name: Phoenix Pharmaceuticals
labs.description: Peptide level determination/quantitation services for research/clinical use.

labs.name: Testides
labs.description: Canadian independent lab offering HPLC purity + mass spec identity confirmation on research peptides incl. GLP-1s (semaglutide, tirzepatide); publicly viewable COAs, 3-7 day turnaround. No endotoxin/heavy-metal/sterility panels.

labs.name: Veritas Analytic
labs.description: Full-service third-party supplement and chemical testing with ~4-5 day turnaround; Amazon-compliant testing and COAs covering peptide/research compounds.

labs.name: AccuMark Labs
labs.description: Anaheim, CA independent peptide testing lab. Core panel = HPLC identity/purity/quantity; add-on biosafety tests (endotoxin LAL, sterility PCR). Identity is HPLC-based only; LC-MS identity planned for ~June 2026. 48-72h turnaround with cryptographically signed, scan-to-verify digital COAs + PDF.

labs.name: ARQ Biolabs
labs.description: Independent European peptide testing lab using validated HPLC and LC-MS methods with ISO 9001 quality systems and digitally verifiable COAs.

labs.name: Bioviridian Inc.
labs.description: Specialized synthetic peptide characterization laboratory using LC-MS, MALDI-MS, and HPLC workflows.

labs.name: CertikLabs
labs.description: Independent peptide verification platform with HPLC purity testing, LC-MS identity confirmation, and public batch verification.

labs.name: Elementrix Diagnostics
labs.description: Independent testing lab offering USP-style peptide testing workflows, HPLC and LC-MS verification, and COA validation.

labs.name: JRAX Bio Solutions
labs.description: Batch-verification peptide testing company offering HPLC and LC-ESI-MS testing with public COA publishing.

labs.name: NovaCert
labs.description: Independent peptide certification and testing platform offering LC-MS/HPLC testing, tamper-evident COAs, and public verification systems.

labs.name: PepTegrity Australia
labs.description: Australian peptide testing provider focused on GLP-1 and research peptide verification using HPLC and LC-MS methods.

labs.name: SP Bio Testing
labs.description: Independent peptide testing provider focused on LC-MS/MS verification and QR-verifiable reporting.

labs.name: TrustPointe Analytics
labs.accreditation: US (Michigan) QC lab founded by pharmaceutical-industry chemists; states methods are validated for accuracy, precision and linearity to USP standards. No ISO/A2LA accreditation stated on site.
labs.caveat: Community-recommended (frequently cited alongside Janoshik and Freedom Diagnostics) with USP-validated HPLC methods and a QR-verifiable COA portal. Has publicly acknowledged past COA-error incidents, so still verify the report on its portal.
labs.description: US analytical QC lab for research peptides and wellness products: HPLC potency/purity/ID, microbial and endotoxin testing, custom COAs, and an online COA verification portal.

labs.name: Analytical Formulations Inc. (AFI)
labs.accreditation: Independent US lab; quantitation via UV/Vis Beer-Lambert assay (also offers HPLC/LC-MS services).
labs.caveat: Quantitative mass/potency results are reported via a UV/Vis Beer-Lambert assay, which cannot separate the target peptide from other UV-absorbing material the way HPLC/LC-MS can and can therefore over-report content; the community has reported inflated results on low/near-empty vials (not independently confirmed here). Cross-check potency against an HPLC/MS lab (e.g. Janoshik) before relying on it.
labs.description: Independent US analytical lab offering peptide testing and COAs; uses a UV/Vis Beer-Lambert quantitative assay alongside HPLC/LC-MS services.
